data.name: ABjee Travel
data.area: Gulmarg, Pahalgam, Sonamarg, Srinagar, Anantnag, Yusmarg
data.description: Discover the paradise of Kashmir with ABjee Travel Plan. Explore the breathtaking beauty of Srinagar, the snow-covered landscapes of Gulmarg, the lush valleys of Pahalgam, and the serene meadows of Sonamarg. Visit the famous Dal Lake, Nigeen Lake, Mughal Gardens, Shankaracharya Temple, Betaab Valley, Aru Valley, and Thajiwas Glacier. We provide customized itineraries, comfortable hotels, houseboat stays, local sightseeing, airport transfers, and reliable transportation. Experience Kashmir's natural beauty, culture, and hospitality with our affordable and hassle-free tour packages. Book your dream Kashmir holiday today with ABjee Travel
